prevalence.source: Indian IBD registry and gastroenterology syntheses
prevalence.trend: increasing with urbanization and improved diagnosis

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to chronic symptoms and flares

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical symptoms plus colonoscopy with biopsy; exclude infections (including intestinal TB)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; biologic access limited by cost

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Colonoscopy available in tertiary centers; delays in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: 5-ASA, corticosteroids for flares, immunomodulators; biologics in select cases; colectomy for refractory disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Cost barriers and overlap with infectious colitis
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing IBD expertise in major centers
